facility_terms.interest_rate_description: Uncommitted arrangement — Purchase Price = Net Invoice Amount x Advance Rate

eligibility_criteria.name: Eligible Counterparty
eligibility_criteria.description: Counterparty must be an Eligible Debtor or approved in writing by Investment Agent

eligibility_criteria.name: AED Currency
eligibility_criteria.description: All amounts payable must be in AED

eligibility_criteria.name: Payment to Custody Account
eligibility_criteria.description: Amounts must be paid directly to the Custody Account

eligibility_criteria.name: Clean Payment
eligibility_criteria.description: No withholding, counterclaim, deduction or set-off unless approved by Investment Agent

eligibility_criteria.name: Standard Form Claim
eligibility_criteria.description: Must be in the standard form of the relevant Customer

eligibility_criteria.name: Debtor Approved
eligibility_criteria.description: Approved by the Eligible Debtor per its current policies and guidelines

eligibility_criteria.name: No WAL Breach
eligibility_criteria.description: WAL of Eligible Receivables must be ≤ 70 days AND/OR Extended Age Receivables ≤ 5% of aggregate OPB

eligibility_criteria.name: No Monthly Denial Rate Breach
eligibility_criteria.description: Monthly Denial Rate must not have been breached and be continuing

eligibility_criteria.name: No Borrowing Base Deficiency
eligibility_criteria.description: No Borrowing Base Deficiency exists at time of purchase

advance_rates.condition: Purchase Price = Adjusted Net Invoice Amount = Net Invoice Amount x Advance Rate
advance_rates.section_ref: Section 1(e), Exhibit A — Adjusted Net Invoice Amount

reporting_requirements.name: Quarterly Unaudited Financials
reporting_requirements.description: Unaudited balance sheet within 30 days of quarter-end

reporting_requirements.name: Annual Audited Financials
reporting_requirements.description: Audited consolidated financials (180 days for FY2025)

reporting_requirements.name: Weekly Movables Registration
reporting_requirements.description: On last Business Day of each calendar week: register true sales on Movables Security Register

definitions.Account Debtor: Insurance companies/TPAs listed on Schedule II + any subsequently approved by Buyer
definitions.Adjusted Net Invoice Amount: Net Invoice Amount x Advance Rate
definitions.Age: Days elapsed since the claim submission date of a Receivable; zero for Repaid Amounts
definitions.Borrowing Base: Adjusted Pool Balance + cash in Collections Account (principal collections net of accrued Murabaha Profit)
definitions.Collections: All funds received in payment of Receivables + Deemed Collections + Related Security proceeds
definitions.Customer: Healthcare providers who originate receivables and sell to KKT
definitions.Dilution: Reduction/cancellation due to defective goods/services, contract changes, setoff — NOT inability to pay
definitions.Eligible Debtor: Not Affiliate of Parent; not insolvent; UAE-incorporated; on Eligible Debtor List or approved
definitions.Extended Age Receivables: Receivables with Age > 70 days but ≤ 90 days
definitions.Net Invoice Amount: Total amount payable by Account Debtor net of VAT, discounts, credits
definitions.Outstanding Purchase Amount: Net Invoice Amount minus aggregate Collections deposited
definitions.Portfolio: All Receivables owned by the Company + all Repaid Amounts
definitions.Repaid Amounts: Cash collections in Collection Account not yet applied or swept
definitions.Retained Amount: Excess of Net Invoice Amount over Adjusted Net Invoice Amount (the holdback)
definitions.Weighted Average Life: Sum(OPB_i x Age_i) / Total OPB including Eligible, Ineligible, and Repaid Amounts
